hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.rs$' && rustfmt "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

echo '{"systemMessage": "Consider whether the work you just completed revealed any new non-obvious information about the codebase (architecture, patterns, debugging tips, workflows) that is not already in CLAUDE.md. If so, update CLAUDE.md before finishing."}'
